member.name: T:TransactionRecord
member.summary:
The complete record for a transaction on Hedera that has reached consensus.

This is not-free to request and is available for 1 hour after a transaction reaches consensus.

A {@link TransactionReceipt} can be thought of as a light-weight record which is free to ask for if you just need what it contains. A receipt however lasts for only 180 seconds.

member.name: F:TransactionRecord.Receipt
member.summary: The status (reach consensus, or failed, or is unknown) and the ID of any new account/file/instance created.

member.name: F:TransactionRecord.TransactionHash
member.summary: The hash of the Transaction that executed (not the hash of any Transaction that failed for having a duplicate TransactionId).

member.name: F:TransactionRecord.ConsensusTimestamp
member.summary: The consensus timestamp (or null if didn't reach consensus yet).

member.name: F:TransactionRecord.TransactionId
member.summary: The ID of the transaction this record represents.

member.name: F:TransactionRecord.TransactionMemo
member.summary: The memo that was submitted as part of the transaction (max 100 bytes).

member.name: F:TransactionRecord.TransactionFee
member.summary: The actual transaction fee charged, not the original transactionFee value from TransactionBody.

member.name: F:TransactionRecord.ContractFunctionResult
member.summary: Record of the value returned by the smart contract function or constructor.

member.name: F:TransactionRecord.Transfers
member.summary: All hbar transfers as a result of this transaction, such as fees, or transfers performed by the transaction, or by a smart contract it calls, or by the creation of threshold records that it triggers.

member.name: T:TransactionRecord_2
member.summary: All fungible token transfers as a result of this transaction as a map

member.name: F:TransactionRecord.TokenTransferList
member.summary: All fungible token transfers as a result of this transaction as a list

member.name: T:TransactionRecord_3
member.summary: All NFT Token transfers as a result of this transaction

member.name: F:TransactionRecord.ScheduleRef
member.summary: Reference to the scheduled transaction ID that this transaction record represents

member.name: F:TransactionRecord.AssessedCustomFees
member.summary: All custom fees that were assessed during a CryptoTransfer, and must be paid if the transaction status resolved to SUCCESS

member.name: F:TransactionRecord.AutomaticTokenAssociations
member.summary: All token associations implicitly created while handling this transaction

member.name: F:TransactionRecord.AliasKey
member.summary: In the record of an internal CryptoCreate transaction triggered by a user transaction with a (previously unused) alias, the new account's alias.

member.name: F:TransactionRecord.Children
member.summary: The records of processing all child transaction spawned by the transaction with the given top-level id, in consensus order. Always empty if the top-level status is UNKNOWN.

member.name: F:TransactionRecord.Duplicates
member.summary: The records of processing all consensus transaction with the same id as the distinguished record above, in chronological order.

member.name: F:TransactionRecord.ParentConsensusTimestamp
member.summary: In the record of an internal transaction, the consensus timestamp of the user transaction that spawned it.

member.name: F:TransactionRecord.EthereumHash
member.summary: The keccak256 hash of the ethereumData. This field will only be populated for EthereumTransaction.

member.name: F:TransactionRecord.HbarAllowanceAdjustments
member.summary: An approved allowance of hbar transfers for a spender

member.name: F:TransactionRecord.TokenAllowanceAdjustments
member.summary: An approved allowance of token transfers for a spender

member.name: F:TransactionRecord.TokenNftAllowanceAdjustments
member.summary: An approved allowance of NFT transfers for a spender

member.name: F:TransactionRecord.PaidStakingRewards
member.summary: List of accounts with the corresponding staking rewards paid as a result of a transaction.

member.name: F:TransactionRecord.PrngBytes
member.summary: In the record of a UtilPrng transaction with no output range, a pseudorandom 384-bit string.

member.name: F:TransactionRecord.PrngNumber
member.summary: In the record of a PRNG transaction with an output range, the output of a PRNG whose input was a 384-bit string.

member.name: F:TransactionRecord.EvmAddress
member.summary: The new default EVM address of the account created by this transaction. This field is populated only when the EVM address is not specified in the related transaction body.

member.name: F:TransactionRecord.PendingAirdropRecords
member.summary: A list of pending token airdrops. Each pending airdrop represents a single requested transfer from a sending account to a recipient account. These pending transfers are issued unilaterally by the sending account, and MUST be claimed by the recipient account before the transfer MAY complete. A sender MAY cancel a pending airdrop before it is claimed. An airdrop transaction SHALL emit a pending airdrop when the recipient has no available automatic association slots available or when the recipient has set `receiver_sig_required`.

member.name: M:TransactionRecord.FromBytes(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Create a transaction record from a byte array.
member.exception: when there is an issue with the protobuf

member.name: M:TransactionRecord.FromProtobuf(Proto.TransactionRecord)
member.summary: Create a transaction record from a protobuf.

member.name: M:TransactionRecord.FromProtobuf(Proto.TransactionRecord,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{TransactionRecord},System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{TransactionRecord},TransactionId)
member.summary: Create a transaction record from a protobuf.

member.name: M:TransactionRecord.ToBytes
member.summary: Create the byte array.

member.name: M:TransactionRecord.ToProtobuf
member.summary: Create the protobuf.

member.name: M:TransactionRecord.ValidateReceiptStatus(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Validate the transaction status in the receipt.
member.param: Whether to perform transaction status validation
member.exception: when shouldValidate is true and the transaction status is not SUCCESS
